## Change Type

- [ ] Framework or architecture change
- [ ] Renderer behavior change
- [ ] Performance change
- [ ] Documentation-only change

## Documentation Sync

For framework-level changes, documentation is part of the definition of done.

- [ ] `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` is updated, or this change does not affect current architecture facts.
- [ ] `docs/ENGINE_REDESIGN_ROADMAP.md` is updated, or this change does not affect roadmap status or scope.
- [ ] `docs/PROJECT_LOG.md` is updated, or this change does not record a project/governance decision.
- [ ] `docs/PERFORMANCE_LOG.md` is updated, or this change does not make measurable performance claims.

## Verification

- [ ] Build passed.
- [ ] Tests passed.
- [ ] UTF-8 check passed.
